ddls:
CREATE TABLE "covid_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state */,
  "month_ended" TEXT /* Date of the month ended */,
  "tests" INTEGER /* Number of tests conducted */,
  "cases" INTEGER /* Number of cases reported */,
  "deaths" INTEGER /* Number of deaths reported */,
  "days" INTEGER /* Number of days in the month */,
  "avg_deaths_day" REAL /* Average deaths per day */,
  "avg_cases_day" REAL /* Average cases per day */,
  "hospitalization_rate" REAL /* Hospitalization rate */,
  "icu_occupation_rate" REAL /* ICU occupation rate */,
  "ventilator_usage_rate" REAL /* Ventilator usage rate */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  "import_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data import */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_covid_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_covid_data_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_covid_data_import_id FOREIGN KEY ("import_id") REFERENCES data_imports ("import_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "state_code" TEXT /* Abbreviated code for the state */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user's role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccination_data" (
  "vaccination_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vaccination entry */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state */,
  "month_ended" TEXT /* Date of the month ended */,
  "vaccinations" INTEGER /* Number of vaccinations administered */,
  "doses_administered" INTEGER /* Number of doses administered */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the state */,
  "vaccination_rate" REAL /* Vaccination rate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vaccination_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_data_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hospitalization_data" (
  "hospitalization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hospitalization entry */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state */,
  "month_ended" TEXT /* Date of the month ended */,
  "hospitalizations" INTEGER /* Number of hospitalizations */,
  "icu_admissions" INTEGER /* Number of ICU admissions */,
  "ventilator_usage" INTEGER /* Number of ventilators in use */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hospitalization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hospitalization_data_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic entry */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group (e.g., 0-17, 18-64, 65+) */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the age group */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the population */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the population */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality" (
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data quality entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data entry */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the data */,
  "completeness" REAL /* Completeness of the data */,
  "consistency" REAL /* Consistency of the data */,
  "timeliness" REAL /* Timeliness of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES covid_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_imports" (
  "import_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data import */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  "import_date" TEXT /* Date of the import */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("import_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_imports_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_imports_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES covid_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the action */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES covid_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "state_regions" (
  "state_region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state-region relationship */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_state_regions_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_state_regions_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each data entry
Number of days in the month
Unique identifier for each vaccination entry
Unique identifier for each hospitalization entry
Unique identifier for each demographic entry
Unique identifier for each data quality entry
Unique identifier for each user role
Unique identifier for each data source
Unique identifier for each data import
Unique identifier for each log entry
Unique identifier for each state-region relationship
